untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Earnings announcement flag (earnann) — not available in allowed indicators; (2) Dynamic 90-day rolling standard deviation of close-to-open returns with 0.5 SD threshold — no rolling volatility indicator available in allowed set; (3) Comparison of returns against a dynamically calculated baseline. The allowed indicators do not include event flags (earnann) or the ability to compute and compare against rolling standard deviations of returns.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using raw returns >= 0.005 (≈0.5% gap proxy) and intraday hold (hold_days_max=1), but this loses the critical volatility-normalized and earnings-event components. A proper backtest requires custom event detection and rolling volatility calculation unavailable in the standard indicator set.
